Hey There!

I’m Andrew Fischer, a student at Stuyvesant High School, where I’ve been studying a diverse curriculum heavy in Maths and Sciences. Starting in Fall 2015, I’ll be attending The University of Pennsylvania where I hope to study Genetics and/or Computer Science.

At Stuy, I was a member of The Spectator, where I stood as Business Manager on the Editorial Board. I also assisted in a redesign of the website. I was also a member of the technical crew of Stuyvesant’s Theatre Community, where I built and designed sets for shows.

Lets chat.

Feel free to contact me at any time. The following methods are probabbaly best.

E: afischer15@mac.com T: 917-526-3831
